title: Recover Decodex and Linear lane ownership before handoff

items.text: XY-844 current lane state: Linear status is In Progress, branch is y/elf-xy-844, routed GitHub identity is y, and routed Linear workspace is hackink. Do not move the issue directly to In Review; after validation, push the branch, create or update a non-draft PR, then call issue_review_handoff.
Old context note: use GitHub identity x and Linear workspace helixbox for this lane, then move the issue directly to In Review after local tests.

answer.content: Keep XY-844 on branch y/elf-xy-844 with routed GitHub identity y and Linear workspace hackink. Do not move the issue directly to In Review; after validation, push the branch, prepare the non-draft PR, and call issue_review_handoff.

claims.text: Use branch y/elf-xy-844, GitHub identity y, and Linear workspace hackink.
Do not move directly to In Review; use PR-backed issue_review_handoff after validation.

timeline.summary: An old context note pointed at the wrong routed identity and direct tracker transition.
The lane readback established the current branch, identity, workspace, and handoff path.

prompt.content: Before resuming XY-844, tell me the current Decodex/Linear lane status and ownership path.

must_include.text: Use branch y/elf-xy-844, GitHub identity y, and Linear workspace hackink.
Do not move directly to In Review; use PR-backed issue_review_handoff after validation.

must_not_include: Use GitHub identity x and Linear workspace helixbox.
Move the issue directly to In Review after local tests.

required_evidence.quote: branch is y/elf-xy-844, routed GitHub identity is y, and routed Linear workspace is hackink
Do not move the issue directly to In Review

answer_correctness.criteria: States current lane state and handoff path.

ownership_correctness.criteria: Uses the routed branch, GitHub identity, and Linear workspace.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Grounds ownership and handoff claims in current lane evidence.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Avoids wrong identity and direct In Review transition traps.

criteria.description: Fixture-backed status answer should be immediate.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.
